name: ai.trustysquire/trusty-squire
title: Trusty Squire
description: Trusty Squire signs up / in to websites for you so you don’t have to.

packageArguments.description: Run the MCP server. The package's default command is the interactive `connect` setup, so clients MUST pass `server` to launch the stdio server. Run `npx @trusty-squire/mcp connect` once beforehand to bind the install to your account.
